title: Emberveil Sprite Adjustment (v1)
description: Per-(character, pose) scale + offset values applied at sprite-draw time. Used to fix sprites that fill their image frame too aggressively (e.g. goblins drawn at the same scale as humans). Authored via the /assets/sprite-adjust.html review tool.

^[a-z][a-z0-9_]{1,47}$.description: Per-character entry. Key is the spriteId (matches appearances.js sprite field or enemy id).

scale.description: Default scale multiplier applied to every pose unless overridden in perPose.

perPose.description: Per-pose overrides. Pose keys: portrait, south, east, east_attack, east_spell, east_block, east_ko.
